summary: Iteration 18 - DOMINANCE & SCALE LAYER + i18n testing complete. Backend: 23/23 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features tested successfully - Language selector (9 languages), Alpha Radar, Market Narrative, JARVIS Universal Narration all working.
passed_tests: API health check - operational
Login with test@test.com/test - success
GET /api/dominance/alpha-detection?language=en - returns AI analysis with market snapshot
GET /api/dominance/alpha-detection?language=pt - returns analysis in Portuguese
GET /api/dominance/alpha-detection?language=es - returns analysis in Spanish
Alpha detection returns 5 top opportunities with Alpha Score, Win Probability, Entry/Exit levels
GET /api/dominance/market-narrative?language=en - returns narrative with market_regime RISK-ON
GET /api/dominance/market-narrative?language=pt - returns narrative in Portuguese
GET /api/dominance/market-narrative?language=fr - returns narrative in French
Market narrative returns regime, confidence, description, market_snapshot
POST /api/voice/narrate - English - returns audio/mpeg blob
POST /api/voice/narrate - Portuguese - translates and returns audio
POST /api/voice/narrate - Spanish - translates and returns audio
POST /api/voice/narrate - German - translates and returns audio
Existing endpoints: /api/market/overview, /api/subscription/plans, /api/tutorial/steps all working
Authenticated endpoints: /api/portfolio, /api/watchlist working
Previous Unfair Advantage APIs: trader-dna, strategies/marketplace, global-intelligence, opportunity-scanner, top-traders all working
Frontend: Language selector shows current language (PT default), 9 language options available
Frontend: Changing to EN updates sidebar labels to English (Intelligence, Analysis, Trading)
Frontend: Changing to ES updates sidebar labels to Spanish (Inteligencia, Analisis)
Frontend: Alpha Radar page loads with 'Escanear Alpha' (PT) / 'Scan for Alpha' (EN) button
Frontend: Alpha Radar scan returns TOP 5 ALPHA OPPORTUNITIES with detailed analysis
Frontend: Market Narrative page loads with 'Gerar Narrativa' (PT) / 'Generate Narrative' (EN) button
Frontend: Market Narrative shows RISK-ON regime (85% confidence) + full narrative
Frontend: JARVIS Narrate button appears on both Alpha Radar and Market Narrative results
Frontend: Sidebar shows new items - Alpha Radar, Narrativa (in Intelligence section)
Frontend: All 6 previous Unfair Advantage pages accessible (/trader-dna, /strategy-marketplace, /global-intelligence, /opportunity-scanner, /social-proof, /jarvis-challenge)
critical_code_review_comments: i18n implementation uses LanguageContext with 9 languages - PT, EN, ES, FR, DE, ZH, JA, KO, AR
Default language is PT (Portuguese) stored in localStorage 'aureos_lang'
Sidebar uses labelKey for translations, correctly updates when language changes
Alpha Detection and Market Narrative use GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key - response time 5-15 seconds
Voice narrate translates non-English text before TTS using GPT-5.2
Alpha Radar returns 5 opportunities with: Asset, Direction, Alpha Score (0-100), Win Probability, Reasoning, Entry Zone, Stop Loss, Target, Timeframe
Market Narrative returns: regime detection (RISK-ON/OFF/CONSOLIDATION/ROTATION/TRANSITIONAL), full narrative covering Big Story, Capital Flows, Smart Money, Risk Landscape, Outlook
seed_data_creation: None required - all endpoints work without seed data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 added DOMINANCE & SCALE LAYER: 1) Multi-language i18n system (9 languages) with language selector in header, 2) Alpha Radar page at /alpha-radar with AI-powered opportunity detection, 3) Market Narrative page at /market-narrative with AI market story generation, 4) JARVIS Universal Narration (POST /api/voice/narrate) for any text in any language. All endpoints use real GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key (5-15s response time). Language selector stores preference in localStorage 'aureos_lang'. Default language is PT. Sidebar labels use translation keys (labelKey). Alpha Radar and Narrativa added to Intelligence section in sidebar. All previous Unfair Advantage pages still accessible.

mocked_components.note: NO MOCKED APIS - All use real GPT-5.2
real_integrations: Alpha Detection: GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key (real AI analysis)
Market Narrative: GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key (real narrative generation)
Voice Narrate: GPT-5.2 for translation + OpenAI TTS for speech synthesis

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found. All DOMINANCE & SCALE LAYER features working correctly.
